title: ASR Outdoor 3 in 1 Head Lamp 1.5 Watt COB Bulb 200 Lumen LED Light 3 Stages
description:
Have you ever found yourself in a situation where you just didn't have enough light? You can avoid this by adding one crucial piece of equipment to your outdoor and emergency gear - the ASR Outdoor 3 in 1 Head Lamp. Headlamps (also known as headlights and head torches) are a light source affixed to the head for outdoor activities, at night or in dark conditions such as caving, hiking, skiing, backpacking, and camping, but can also come in handy at home, too. Never get caught under the sink, in your dark basement or in a crawlspace again without adequate lighting with the ASR Outdoor Head Lamp. Our headlamp is powered by 3 AAA batteries (not included) and comes with an adjustable elastic head strap so you can easily attach the lamp to your head or helmet

ASR Outdoor 3 in 1 Head Lamp 1.5 Watt COB Bulb 200 Lumen LED Light 3 Stages

Have you ever found yourself in a situation where you just didn't have enough light? You can avoid this by adding one crucial piece of equipment to your outdoor and emergency gear - the ASR Outdoor 3 in 1 Head Lamp. Headlamps (also known as headlights and head torches) are a light source affixed to the head for outdoor activities, at night or in dark conditions such as caving, hiking, skiing, backpacking, and camping, but can also come in handy at home, too. Never get caught under the sink, in your dark basement or in a crawlspace again without adequate lighting with the ASR Outdoor Head Lamp.

Key Features

  • 3 IN 1 HEAD LAMP - ASR Outdoor Head Lamp with 50% Brightness, 100% Brightness and Safety Flashing Light Functions | 3 Stage Switch Button Easily Cycles Through Options
  • ADJUSTABLE HEAD STRAP - Comes with Black Elastic Head Strap | One Size Fits Most | Attach to Head or Helmet for Hands-free Light
  • BATTERY POWERED - Requires 3 AAA Batteries (Not Included) | Super Bright 200 Lumen COB LED Light Provides Added Visibility and Safety
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made of High-quality Water-resistant Plastic | Ideal for Outdoor and Nighttime Activities, Camping, Hiking, Home Improvement, Repairs and More
  • COMPACT DESIGN - Light with Band Weighs Just .08 Pounds (1.28 Ounces) | Won't Take Up Too Much Space, Easy to Pack for Travel

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASROSHL200L
  • UPC: 855569007591
  • Color: White
  • Size: Small

Our headlamp is powered by 3 AAA batteries (not included) and comes with an adjustable elastic head strap so you can easily attach the lamp to your head or helmet. It features a 3 in 1 COB & LED light that will 50% brightness, 100% brightness or a flashing light with the press of a 3 stage switch button. These different light functions give you the option to utilize the best light for whatever situation you find yourself in.

The 200 Lumen light will ensure a super bright lighting experience and can provide extra visibility for an added safety measure. The lamp itself is constructed of durable and lightweight plastic that is water-resistant, so you can use it in inclement weather.

Whether you're camping with friends or family, biking at night or fixing a plumbing issue in a dark area of your house, the ASR Outdoor 3 Function Head Lamp will help keep you safe and visible in dark conditions and provide hands-free light so you can get the job done. Make sure to grab a few of these to keep in your outdoor, home improvement and emergency gear!
